USURPER REBORN
==============

A faithful remake of the classic 1993 BBS door game "Usurper" by Jakob Dangarden.

Free and Open Source Software - GPL v2 Licensed


GETTING STARTED

  Windows:  Double-click Play.bat (desktop) or UsurperReborn.exe (terminal)
  Linux:    Run ./play.sh (desktop) or ./UsurperReborn (terminal)
  macOS:    Run play.sh or open usurper-reborn.app


ONLINE PLAY

  SSH:  ssh usurper@play.usurper-reborn.net -p 4000
  Web:  https://usurper-reborn.net


BBS DOOR MODE

  UsurperReborn --door <dropfile>     Auto-detect DOOR32.SYS or DOOR.SYS
  UsurperReborn --stdio              Standard I/O mode (for Synchronet)
  UsurperReborn --local              Local testing mode


GPL v2 COMPLIANCE

  This software is licensed under GPL v2.
  Source code: https://github.com/binary-knight/usurper-reborn
